'''Blizzard 1''',<ref name="CL">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> alternatively spelled '''''Blizzard One''''', was an [[All Terrain Armored Transport]] which served as [[General]] [[Maximilian Veers]]' personal [[walker]] during the [[Battle of Hoth]]<ref name="SWCT" /> as part of the [[Blizzard Force]] unit.<ref name="AbEverything" /> From the cockpit of Blizzard 1, Veers led the Imperial assault on [[Echo Base]], the Hothian headquarters of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]], as [[vehicle commander]]. Although the general's walker managed to destroy the massive [[Deflector shield|shield]] [[Deflector shield generator|generator]] that powered Echo Base,<ref name="ESB" /> Blizzard 1 was decapitated when an enemy [[T-47 airspeeder]] flown by [[Rebel pilot]] [[Derek Klivian]] and his tailgunner [[Kesin Ommis]] crashed into its cockpit; although Veers was severely injured, he managed to escape alive.<ref name="OTFL" />
